zh.lifeSummary: 當James Reynold de Peckham Esq.於1400年出生在英國肯特萊坦時，他的父親Reginald Peckham40歲，母親Lady Alice Wadham24歲。他於1435年與Alice De Wypeham在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年在英國英格蘭素可阿申波恩哈姆享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peckham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from East and West Peckham (Kent), Peckham in Camberwell (Surrey), or Peckham Farm in Framfield (Sussex). All three placenames probably derive from Old English pēac ‘peak’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

en.lifeSummary: When James Reynold de Peckham Esq. was born in 1400, in Wrotham, Kent, England, his father, Reginald Peckham, was 40 and his mother, Lady Alice Wadham, was 24. He married Alice De Wypeham in 1435, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1454, in Ashburnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Reynold de Peckham Esq. est né en 1400, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Reginald Peckham, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Wadham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice De Wypeham en 1435, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1454, à Ashburnham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Reynold de Peckham Esq. 1400 in Wrotham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald Peckham 40 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Wadham 24. Er hat 1435 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Alice De Wypeham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1454 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ashburnham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Reynold de Peckham Esq. è nato il nel 1400 nel Wrotham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Reginald Peckham, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Wadham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice De Wypeham nel 1435, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1454, nel Ashburnham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: James Reynold de Peckham Esq.(이)가 1400년 영국 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Peckham(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Wadham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 Alice De Wypeham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 애스h번함에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Reynold de Peckham Esq. родился в 1400 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald Peckham было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Wadham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice De Wypeham в 1435 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1454 г. в местности ашбурнам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Reynold de Peckham Esq. nació en 1400, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald Peckham, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Wadham, tenía 24 años.
